_comment: Music source map for in-battle BGM. Per the project decision, the .ogg tracks themselves are NOT vendored into this repo (193 files / ~147MB). At battle start the runtime downloads ONLY the track the stage needs and the browser HTTP-caches it. A track id N resolves to the file `${id padded to `pad` digits}.ogg`. Download order: localBaseUrl override (a same-named file dropped into public/assets/music/ wins), then cdnBaseUrl (jsDelivr's Cloudflare-backed mirror of bcu-assets, Access-Control-Allow-Origin:* — the reliable PRIMARY because raw.githubusercontent is throttled/blocked on many networks), then remoteBaseUrl (raw.githubusercontent fallback, same bytes).
